title: BEM-863 route 862
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt','governance/protocols']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 11:59 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem862_execute_bem861_route.json')
ps=prev.get('status','unknown')
created_files=[]
if ps=='protocol_result_created':
    status='protocol_result_exists_next'
    next_action='read decision and finalize/repair'
elif ps=='ensure_step_inspected':
    # Fail closed in repo now: record BLOCKED protocol result because dispatcher still did not produce required file.
    resp=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem844_claude_response.md')
    if not resp.exists():
        resp.write_text('# CLAUDE RESPONSE | BEM-844'+sep+sep+'Date: '+created+sep+'Decision: BLOCKED'+sep+'Reason: The real Claude dispatcher did not produce the required response file after dispatch, ensure-step, and commit-path repairs. This is a fail-closed result, not approval.'+sep)
        created_files.append(str(resp))
    protocol=Path('governance/protocols/BEM863_PROTOCOL_BLOCKED_RESULT.md')
    protocol.write_text('# BEM-863 | Protocol Blocked Result'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Decision: BLOCKED'+sep+sep+'Причина: Claude runtime/response path did not produce a real response after repaired dispatch queue, response writer, writer placement and commit path. PASS запрещён.'+sep+sep+'Следующее действие: repair Claude dispatcher runtime/action logs or replace transport with a proven direct Claude execution channel.'+sep)
    created_files.append(str(protocol))
    status='fail_closed_blocked_protocol_created'
    next_action='continue repair of Claude dispatcher runtime/action logs; do not claim protocol approved'
elif ps=='probe_queued_wait_tick':
    status='probe_tick_required'
    next_action='fresh tick and verify probe'
else:
    status='unknown_bem862_status'
    next_action='diagnose BEM-862 state'
state={'bem':'BEM-863','status':status,'previous_status':ps,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem863_route_after_bem862.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem863_route_after_bem862.md').write_text('# BEM-863 | Route After BEM-862 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem863_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-863'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem863_route_after_bem862.json','governance/reports/bem863_route_after_bem862.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem863_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Routed after BEM-862; if ensure step was present but no response appeared, created a fail-closed BLOCKED protocol result while keeping repair active')
"""
